args.query: SELECT Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, AccountId FROM Contact WHERE Id = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR' LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, AccountId FROM Contact WHERE Id = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR' LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT Id, Name FROM Product2 WHERE lower(trim(Name)) LIKE '%ai%processing%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, Name FROM Product2 WHERE lower(trim(Name)) LIKE '%ai%processing%';

args.query: SELECT Id, AccountId, Status, EffectiveDate FROM "Order" WHERE REPLACE(AccountId, '#', '') = '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' ORDER BY EffectiveDate DESC;

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, AccountId, Status, EffectiveDate FROM "Order" WHERE REPLACE(AccountId, '#', '') = '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' ORDER BY EffectiveDate DESC;

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, OrderId, Product2Id, Quantity, UnitPrice FROM OrderItem WHERE REPLACE(OrderId, '#', '') = '801Wt00000PHRYWIA5';
